mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chat_memory( memoryno, memberno, dogno, source_chatno, memory_type, memory_text, importance, use_count, last_used, active_yn, rdate )
VALUES( chat_memory_seq.nextval, #{memberno}, #{dogno}, #{source_chatno}, #{memory_type}, #{memory_text}, #{importance}, #{use_count}, #{last_used}, #{active_yn}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT memoryno, memberno, dogno, source_chatno, memory_type, memory_text, importance, use_count, last_used, active_yn, rdate
FROM chat_memory
WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
ORDER BY memoryno DESC

SELECT memoryno, memberno, dogno, source_chatno, memory_type, memory_text, importance, use_count, last_used, active_yn, rdate
FROM chat_memory
WHERE dogno = #{dogno}
ORDER BY memoryno DESC

SELECT memoryno, memberno, dogno, source_chatno, memory_type, memory_text, importance, use_count, last_used, active_yn, rdate
FROM chat_memory
ORDER BY memoryno DESC
